data.body: COMPLETE: op-cert epic plan-review convergence. 6/6 signed PASS (8d8e r10, ee0b r7, 76d2 r19, 8f1d r4, 6a89 r3, 4214 r3). Final rounds hardened 76d2 to executable-proof level (literal jq -e assertions incl. lifecycle_meta_arguments path + all() route aggregation, structural deny-all nginx map via zero-match glob include, key-loss recovery runbook, two-step guard rotation). file_impact metadata corrected post-cost-revision. Ready for /rebar-implement in dependency order.
